infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Burqan to scan store QR codes and take store photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Burqan to choose store photos from your gallery.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Burqan uses your location to register stores, verify you are at the store, and assign the correct area.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Burqan to scan store QR codes.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Burqan uses your location to register stores and verify you are at the store.
